title: Clean up Docker reference handling
body:
This pulls in mtrmac/image:docker-references and updates for the API change, to demonstrate things working.

Do not merge as is, I will re-vendor from the master branch after merging the other PR.

comments.body: Updated to pull from `master` and squashed, please ACK so that we keep the two projects in sync.
ack, feel free to merge as soon as CI is green :)
